description: Detectron2 is a platform for object detection, segmentation and other visual recognition tasks.

Digital Avatar Conversational System - Linly-Talker. Linly-Talker is an intelligent AI system that combines large language models (LLMs) with visual models to create a novel human-AI interaction method. It integrates various technologies like Whisper, Linly, Microsoft Speech Services, and SadTalker talking head generation system.

Official implementation of HairGS, a novel framework for reconstructing detailed hair strands from multi-view images using 3D Gaussian Splatting. The method introduces a multi-stage pipeline for geometry reconstruction, strand merging, and photometric refinement, along with a new metric for evaluating topological accuracy.
